title: FaceSwap Deepfake System
subtitle: Undergraduate capstone project
summary: A bachelor's graduation project focused on generating face-swapped short videos, with attention to the full pipeline rather than only the core model.

blocks.text: The core work centered on the intracoder and color-correction modules. The broader challenge was stitching detection, alignment, fusion, and post-processing into one pipeline.

items: Identity swap plus color correction modules
Detection treated as a survey in the final paper
